Game.Name: Saikyou - Takada Nobuhiko (Japan)
Game.plot: Saikyou: Takada Nobuhiko is an Action game, developed by Dual and published by Hudson,which was released in Japan in 1995.Cheat: Unlock Title Match mode.To unlock the Title Match mode, play through "Story" mode with any character and become world Champion. Once the game's credits are finished, press "start" to return to the main menu and choose to play through "Story" mode once again. At the character selection screen, choose your new World Champion (the character you used to complete "Story" mode with the first time, now indicated with a championship belt icon next to their portrait). After "Story" mode's brief intro, a new menu will be unlocked and displayed before each match enabling the ability to change arenas and customize match types.
Game.Notes: Takada Nubihiko and his UWF International are here to prove they are the toughest, baddest wrestlers in the world! Take on the roster and make yourself known as the greatest wrestler of all time, and do it strong style!
